name: zpl-engine-mcp
description: v4.0.0 MAJOR RELEASE: 21 bugs fixed including the critical wizard-key regex that left 0% of new installs functional. New: memory-aware setup (no forced re-login), `whoami` / `repair` / `diagnose` commands, `--force` / `--help` / `--version` flags, smoke test at setup completion, Cloudflare HTML detection, deduplication of legacy Claude Desktop entries, secret sanitizer fix (was leaking wizard prefixes + Anthropic keys), safety bounds on numeric env vars, token-cost tracking in 22 tools. 68 tools (64 unique + 4 aliases) across 11 categories. 146 tests (98 unit + 48 integration). Cross-OS verified Windows + Linux Alpine. Free plan: 5,000 tokens/month. User-key only. Mathematical stability engine for measuring balance and bias in finance, gaming, AI/ML, security, and crypto data. AIN is a STABILITY measurement only — never prediction or advice.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test test/engine-url.test.mjs test/patch-config.test.mjs test/api-key-format.test.mjs test/config-toml.test.mjs test/estimate-tokens.test.mjs test/dedupe-mcp-entries.test.mjs test/cloudflare-error.test.mjs test/setup-memory.test.mjs test/source-regressions.test.mjs test/edge-cases.test.mjs test/sanitize-secrets.test.mjs

author: Ciciu Alexandru-Costinel — Zero Point Logic <contact@zeropointlogic.io>
